pickup.effect: Increases impact damage against stone creatures

pickup.name: Magma Heart
pickup.effect: Grants complete immunity to lava damage

encounters.trigger: The Revenant's death triggers the opening of the main Boss chamber vault.

boss.name: Ignis, the Living Eruption
